meaning: n.一种粗尾的羊,其小羊的皮毛
examples: A Poiret coat from 1919 demonstrates the exquisiteness of many of his designs, incorporating black silk and wool weave with white kid cutwork applique and white broadtail trim.
Broadtail, sable and chinchilla caplets and stoles were dyed to perfectly match the palette of blush, champagne, pearl.
